We Make Bobbin Lace

Get ready to dive into creativity with our amazing Tutor, Amanda! She has crafted an exciting series of patterns specifically for beginners to master essential techniques. The best part? Students can pick and choose their favourite patterns!

Your Learning Journey

🐍
Step 1

The Basics: Snakes & Bookmarks

Prepare to immerse yourself in the art of bobbin lace! Your journey begins with engaging patterns designed to introduce you to new stitches. Although some patterns may feature many repetitions, rest assured — this repetition is a method to strengthen your skills and keep your knowledge sharp.

After you've perfected the snakes, we'll jump into an exciting bookmark that showcases ground stitch and lovely fans! Next, we'll discover the delightful Honeycombe and venture into a whimsical cloth stitch path adorned with playful spiders.

Step 2

Navigating Corners

Prepare to enhance your skills! Building on the techniques you've already mastered, our next exciting project delves into the exhilarating idea of navigating "around a corner."

You might feel an "uh oh" as you face this challenge, but rest assured — it's simpler than you expect to master that "simple" corner. We'll strengthen this technique with a stunning fan edging, where you'll also discover how to achieve a pretty edge.

🪭

Class Schedule

Tuesday Mornings

Boorley Green

  • Perfect for early birds and retirees
  • All abilities welcome, from complete beginners to advanced
  • Equipment available to borrow while learning

Thursday Evenings

Botley

  • Ideal for those with daytime commitments
  • All abilities welcome, from complete beginners to advanced
  • Equipment available to borrow while learning
Enquire About Classes

What to Expect

Learn at Your Pace

Pick and choose your favourite patterns. There's no pressure — everyone progresses differently!

Friendly Community

Join a welcoming group of lace enthusiasts. Make new friends while learning a beautiful craft.

Expert Guidance

Our tutor Amanda brings years of experience and patience to help you master every technique.

Hedge End Bobbin Lacemakers

Join our vibrant community and explore the beautiful art of bobbin lace-making. All skill levels welcome.
